SQLScript:
WITH MaxFileID AS (
	SELECT MAX(FileID) AS MaxFileID
	FROM PCPAttribution
	WHERE FileLayoutID = 34000
)
,EligibleMemberData AS(
SELECT DISTINCT   
    COALESCE(nullif(mpb.UniquePersonKey,'None'),nullif(mpb.PlanMemberID,'None')) AS MemberID
  ,COALESCE(nullif(ompb.UniquePersonKey,'None'),nullif(ompb.PlanMemberID,'None')) AS OriginalMemberID
FROM MemberPersonBridge mpb
  INNER JOIN HedisEligibleMember hem
    ON mpb.BISInternalPersonId = hem.BISInternalPersonId
  LEFT JOIN MemberPersonBridge ompb
    ON ompb.BISInternalPersonId = hem.BISInternalPersonId
    AND ompb.IsOriginalMemberId = 1
)
,InitialMemberPCP AS (
	SELECT COALESCE(pcp.UniquePersonKey,pcp.PlanMemberID) AS MemberID
			,pcp.ProviderID
			,date_format(pcp.StartDate,'yyyyMMdd') AS StartDate
			,date_format(pcp.EndDate,'yyyyMMdd') AS EndDate
	FROM PCPAttribution pcp
		JOIN MaxFileID mfid ON pcp.FileID = mfid.MaxFileID		
)
,OriginalMemberIds AS (
	SELECT em.OriginalMemberID
			,imp.*
	FROM InitialMemberPCP imp
			JOIN EligibleMemberData em ON imp.MemberID = em.MemberID	
)
SELECT DISTINCT omi.OriginalMemberID AS MemberID
		,omi.ProviderID
		,omi.StartDate
		,omi.EndDate
		,'' AS AdditionalColumn1
		,'' AS AdditionalColumn2
		,'' AS AdditionalColumn3
		,'' AS AdditionalColumn4
		,'' AS AdditionalColumn5
		,'' AS Filler
		,current_timestamp() AS LoadDateTime
FROM OriginalMemberIds omi
ORDER BY MemberID, StartDate
